description: CompositionGreen T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm iron Does your little one know how to get things done his way? Then this t-shirt from tantra is a perfect way to flaunt his naughty, kiddy style of managing his life. Team this cotton T-shirt with denim trousers or shorts and floaters, and laugh everytime he tries his trick of wailing to get what he wants.
